lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did King Nahash threaten to do to the people of Jabesh-Gilead?
How was Saul able to defeat King Nahash’s army?
During his last speech, what did Samuel talk about?
answers: How God had rescued his people many times
How great it was that they asked for a king
How mad he was at them
How God was going to punish them

questions.text: What did Samuel warn the people and their king not to do?
answers: Build a statue of the Lord God

questions.text: What miracle did God do to make the people listen to Samuel?
What did Saul’s soldiers do when they saw the Philistine army?
What did Saul want Samuel to do before the battle?
answers: Offer a sacrifice to ask for God’s blessing
Do a miracle to defeat the Philistines

questions.text: How long did Samuel tell Saul to wait for him to arrive?
What did Saul do when Samuel was late?
What consequence did Saul receive for disobeying God?
answers: He would lose his kingdom; God would chose another king
He lost the battle to the Philistines
